content.en:
"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, do you have the Ancestral Law?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor hurriedly asked.

"Yes, but it is a broken Ancestral Law, very incomplete, only one-ten-thousandth of the complete Ancestral Method!"

Ye Tian replied.

"It's only one in 10,000 of the Broken Ancestor Method!" the Fire Tattoo Battle Ancestor frowned, this value was much worse than the complete Ancestor Method.

He quickly laughed to himself, though.

If it is a truly complete and ownerless Ancestral Dharma, then it is not something that he can keep!

Even if it gets out, a big war may start.

Of course, even if it is only one in 10,000 of the mutilated Ancestral Method, its value is unimaginable.

Almost all of the mutilated ancestor methods are ownerless, and in rare cases, they are the mutilated ancestor laws with masters.

Moreover, the Incomplete Ancestor Method should not have been successfully cultivated, otherwise this Incomplete Ancestor Method would not exist.

Therefore, this kind of mutilated ancestor method is a new hope for some Supreme Domain Ancestors who have already given up the Ancestor Realm, and if it is used to exchange for some holy skills, it can naturally be exchanged for a large number of holy skills, which is beyond doubt.

"I need to identify that Broken Ancestor Method, if it's true, the Battle Gate will give you a lot of holy skills, how about it?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Although the Ancestor Law of the Incomplete Emperor is very precious, the Battle Gate is one of the Ten Sacred Gates after all, and the Fire Emblem War Ancestor is one of the deputy masters of the Battle Gate, and it is a very powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor, so he will not covet his Broken Imperial Ancestor Method.

Therefore, he was not worried that his Incomplete Imperial Ancestor Law would be snatched away by the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out his Incomplete Imperial Ancestor Method and handed it to the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor.

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor took a look at the Broken Imperial Ancestor Method, and quickly recognized it.

"It's the incomplete Imperial Ancestor Law!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor muttered.

He deduced this Imperial Ancestor Method, and with his current realm, he could naturally roughly deduce whether the former creator of this Imperial Ancestor Law was still alive.

Soon, the deduction was over.

"Ownerless!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor breathed a sigh of relief.

If there is a master's thing, then the value of this Imperial Ancestor Method is too much worse, and it can only be used to assist in the comprehension of the Defensive Sacred Technique and the Defensive Domain Technique, but no one dares to use the Owner's Incomplete Imperial Ancestor Method to impact the half-step ancestor, not to mention how high the success rate is, even if it succeeds, it will be manipulated by that ancestor.

"This incomplete Ancestor Law is of high value, I can call the shots and give you thirty holy techniques, and there is no limit to the types!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor asked.

At this time, Ye Tian also put forward his own request: "Lord Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, I want to exchange some space holy skills, time holy skills, and defense holy skills, and I hope to hand over the incomplete Imperial Ancestor Law to the Battle Gate later." In order to prevent me from taking away the Ancestral Method, I can practice in the Battle Boundary Tower without leaving the Battle Boundary Tower!"

"Do you want to practice a few more perfect-level defensive holy techniques?"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor roughly guessed Ye Tian's purpose.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"A saint-endowed person can cultivate two holy skills of the same kind at most, and if you cultivate more, the difficulty will increase greatly, and if you want to rely on the consummation holy technique to enhance the foundation and potential, so that the body can be transformed again and again, but only two of the same holy skills have an effect, even if you practice the third defensive holy skill, and cultivate to the consummation realm, it will be of little use to yourself. Otherwise, wouldn't any one of the Holy Endowments be able to cultivate more than one of the same Sacred Techniques? But in reality, there are not many Saint Endowments who practice more than one of the same Divine Techniques, at most two of the same Divine Techniques. "

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Is it effective to have only two holy skills of the same kind?"

Ye Tian really didn't know this secret, he only knew that the more the Holy Technique was consummated, there would be small transformations again and again, and the more benefits he would gain from being promoted to Domain Ancestor in the future.

But I never expected that there could only be two holy skills of the same type that had an effect.

But if you think about it carefully, the Ten Holy Gates may also be able to get the incomplete Ancestor Method, in case any of the Holy Gates get such an Ancestor Method, and the Holy Endowment in the Gate happens to correspond to it, wouldn't it allow a Saint Endowment to cultivate that type of Divine Technique all the time.

In this way, how many holy techniques would have to be cultivated to perfection, and how terrifying the potential should be!!!

In reality, however, this does not exist.

However, Ye Tian didn't care, two Consummation Defense Saint Techniques, plus two Consummation Space Saint Techniques, plus one Consummate Golden Silk Saint Technique, in this way, he also gathered five Perfection Realms, which was definitely far superior to others.

At this moment, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor said good news.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, it is a complete waste for you to exchange this Broken Ancestor Method for thirty Holy Skills, I can suggest you another choice, there is actually a Broken Ancestor Method inside the Battle Gate, which is the Ancestor Law of Strength, you can choose to exchange for enlightenment. The Battle Gate can give you enlightenment with the Broken Ancestor of Force, and help you cultivate the Holy Technique of the two Powers to the perfection realm. After that, the battle gate retracted the Ancestral Law of Force. But in this way, you can only exchange ten holy skills, what do you think?"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor proposed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

It's just shocking!

"Sure enough!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor realized in his heart.

He guessed that Ye Tian had a powerful type of holy endowment, because Ye Tian had chosen to cultivate the Extreme Strength Saint Technique before, that might be a powerful type of holy endowment.

So this time it can be regarded as a small temptation, and it will be tempted out all of a sudden.

If Ye Tian didn't have a kind of holy endowment of power, then there was no need to make such a choice, because if the Ancestor Law of Power was useless to him, why would he choose to attain enlightenment?

Ye Tian also reacted quickly, but he didn't panic.

If you know, you know, anyway, he's not afraid of exposing anything.

After all, he is the first holy son of the battle gate, and the battle gate protects him almost the same.

Next, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor discussed with the other Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, and it was even possible to despise the Ancestor of the Battle Gate.

In short, Ye Tian is not clear about the rest of the matter.

Soon after, the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor sent a message that the Battle Gate agreed to temporarily lend the Ancestor Law of Power to Ye Tian Shenwu.

And Ye Tian can also obtain ten holy skills.

So, Ye Tian immediately chose a defensive holy skill, called the Golden Body Holy Technique, which can be regarded as a relatively popular holy skill; he also chose a space holy skill, called the Empty Escape Holy Technique, which is one of the most awesome escape holy skills, and it is extremely awesome to use to chase and kill the enemy; he also chose a time holy skill, he wanted to choose two time holy skills, but the battle gate only has one time holy skill, which is also a relatively helpless thing, this time holy technique is called the eternal holy skill, which can fix the time, and the power is very terrifying.

In addition to this, he also chose a soul holy skill, a fire holy skill, an ice holy skill, a wood holy skill, an earth holy skill, a water holy skill, and a dark holy skill.

At this point, the ten holy skills have been selected.
